title: copaiba marginata
intro: Copaiba marginata, also known as Copaiba tree or Copaiba balsam, is a tree native to South America and the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Burseraceae family. It is prized for its resin, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The resin of Copaiba marginata contains sesquiterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, providing relief from pain, inflammation, and digestive issues. Copaiba preparations, such as essential oils, extracts, and capsules, are used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being, supporting the immune system, reducing stress, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression.
